name: Luis Ramirez
personality: Luis is hard‑working and low‑key, keeping his eyes on the road and his mind on paying off his daughter's college tuition. He’s friendly enough to share a joke, but prefers to listen more than he talks.
quirk: He always has a loose‑leaf notebook glued to his dashboard where he scribbles the best dim sum spots he discovers on his routes.
voice: "Listen, if you want real pork buns, follow me—just don’t ask for a shortcut through the market after 5 PM."
daily: He starts before dawn, picks up early commuters, weaves through market stalls at lunch, and ends his shift around midnight, dropping off passengers near the ferry terminal.
